candidates.question: Convert 855 kilometers to miles, then add 196 to that value. Finally, check if the resulting sum exceeds 192.
Format the value as a percent, then take the last 5 characters of that string. Using that result, check if that string is longer than 5 characters.

Find how many boxes of 12 are needed for 171 units. Then, using that number of boxes, determine how many pallets are needed if each holds 8 boxes per layer for 3 layers. Finally, check if that pallet count is positive.
Pad the number 7294 with zeros to make a 5-digit string. Then, mask that account number. Finally, get the character and word counts of that masked result.
Calculate the dose for 70 kg at 10 mg per kg. Then decrease that result by 25%. Finally, check if the decreased value equals 125.
